mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, user_id, tenant_id, upload_traffic, download_traffic, total_traffic, request_count, upload_count, download_count, head_count, other_count, image_traffic, video_traffic, document_traffic, other_traffic, stat_date, stat_hour, created_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bucket_traffic_log ( bucket_name, user_id, tenant_id, upload_traffic, download_traffic, total_traffic, request_count, upload_count, download_count, head_count, other_count, image_traffic, video_traffic, document_traffic, other_traffic, stat_date, stat_hour ) VALUES
(#{item.bucketName}, #{item.userId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.uploadTraffic}, #{item.downloadTraffic}, #{item.totalTraffic}, #{item.requestCount}, #{item.uploadCount}, #{item.downloadCount}, #{item.headCount}, #{item.otherCount}, #{item.imageTraffic}, #{item.videoTraffic}, #{item.documentTraffic}, #{item.otherTraffic}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.statHour})
